_meta.description: Deterministic, fictional, NON-PII fixture data for gitlogs. All handles, repos, commit SHAs, tweet IDs and OAuth tokens are fake. Timestamps are literal ISO strings (no Date.now() used to generate them).
_meta.schemaNotes: Shapes are aligned to src/database.js tables. The 'tweets' table only has columns (user_id, repo_name, commit_sha, tweet_id, created_at) and a UNIQUE(commit_sha); it has NO body/status/author columns. The 'text', 'status' and 'author' fields on each tweet below are realism metadata for downstream consumers and are NOT persisted into the tweets table by the seed script.

tweets.author: octo-dev
tweets.text: shipped: idempotency keys on POST /charges so retries never double-charge. one header, zero duplicate payments. (a1b2c3d)

tweets.author: octo-dev
tweets.text: fix: webhook signature check now rejects expired timestamps (>5min). replay attacks, denied. (b2c3d4e)

tweets.author: octo-dev
tweets.text: perf: batched refund settlement cut p99 latency from 820ms to 140ms. fewer round-trips, happier dashboards. (c3d4e5f)

tweets.author: octo-dev
tweets.text: new: multi-currency support for 23 currencies with live FX rounding. charge in INR, settle in USD. (d4e5f60)

tweets.author: octo-dev
tweets.text: fix: stop leaking the full card BIN in audit logs. PCI scope just got smaller. (e5f6071)

tweets.author: mira-builds
tweets.text: added a <Combobox> with full keyboard nav + async loading. accessible by default, no aria gymnastics required. (f607182)

tweets.author: mira-builds
tweets.text: tokens v2: every color now has a contrast-checked dark-mode pair. dark mode is no longer an afterthought. (6071829)

tweets.author: mira-builds
tweets.text: fix: <Tooltip> no longer clips inside scroll containers. it follows you now, politely. (718293a)

tweets.author: mira-builds
tweets.text: shrunk the bundle 18kb by tree-shaking unused icon variants. your lighthouse score says thanks. (8293ab4)

tweets.author: mira-builds
tweets.text: new: motion presets that respect prefers-reduced-motion automatically. delight without nausea. (93ab4c5)

tweets.author: kai-ships
tweets.text: CRDT merge now resolves concurrent edits without a server round-trip. offline-first, conflict-last. (ab4c5d6)

tweets.author: kai-ships
tweets.text: fix: reconnect storm after wifi drop is gone — exponential backoff + jitter on the socket. (b4c5d6e)

tweets.author: kai-ships
tweets.text: perf: delta compression on the sync channel cut bandwidth 60% on large docs. (c5d6e7f)

tweets.author: kai-ships
tweets.text: new: presence cursors with sub-100ms updates. you can finally see where everyone is typing. (d6e7f80)

tweets.author: nova-labs
tweets.text: feature store now caches embeddings — training jobs start 4x faster. less waiting, more learning. (e7f8091)

tweets.author: nova-labs
tweets.text: fix: data drift detector no longer false-alarms on weekend traffic dips. pagers stay quiet. (f8091a2)

tweets.author: nova-labs
tweets.text: new: one-click model rollback when eval metrics regress. ship boldly, revert calmly. (091a2b3)

tweets.author: nova-labs
tweets.text: perf: switched feature joins to columnar reads — nightly batch finishes 90min earlier. (1a2b3c4)

tweets.author: nova-labs
tweets.text: added lineage tracking so every prediction traces back to its exact training snapshot. audit-ready. (2b3c4d5)

tweets.author: pixel-pioneer
tweets.text: GPU instancing landed — 50k sprites at a locked 120fps. the framerate counter is bored now. (3c4d5e6)

tweets.author: pixel-pioneer
tweets.text: fix: texture atlas seams on non-power-of-two assets. no more hairline cracks at the edges. (4d5e6f7)

tweets.author: pixel-pioneer
tweets.text: new: WebGPU backend behind a flag. same scene, half the draw calls. the future renders fast. (5e6f708)

tweets.author: pixel-pioneer
tweets.text: perf: frustum culling rewrite drops idle GPU usage by 35% on static scenes. laptops run cooler. (6f70819)

tweets.author: pixel-pioneer
tweets.text: added hot-reload for shaders — tweak a .wgsl and watch it update without losing scene state. (f70819a)

tweets.author: octo-dev
tweets.text: new: dispute evidence auto-bundles receipts + logs into one upload. chargebacks, contested in one click. (70819ab)

tweets.author: mira-builds
tweets.text: fix: focus ring now visible on every interactive element in high-contrast mode. a11y audit: clean. (819abc2)

tweets.author: kai-ships
tweets.text: new: end-to-end encrypted sync rooms. the server relays bytes it can't read. privacy by design. (19abc2d)

tweets.author: nova-labs
tweets.text: fix: GPU memory leak in the batch inference server — uptime now measured in weeks, not hours. (9abc2d3)

tweets.author: pixel-pioneer
tweets.text: perf: async asset streaming means zero hitches when entering a new zone. seamless worlds. (abc2d3e)

tweets.author: octo-dev
tweets.text: perf: connection pooling to the ledger DB cut checkout latency 40% under peak load. black friday ready. (bc2d3e4)
